entry.title: [Tideforge Reverbs] Reverb Weapon Convene
entry.content:
During the event, selectable 5-Star Weapons: Verdant Summit, Stringmaster, Ages of Harvest, Blazing Brilliance, Rime-Draped Sprouts, Verity's Handle, and 4-Star Weapons: Dauntless Evernight, Variation, and Endless Collapse receive boosted drop rates!

Duration

Version 3.5 update - 2026-08-19 11:59 (server time)

Eligibility

  • Reach Union Level 5.

  • Or complete the combat trial in First Resonance.

  • Or access Main Quest Fast Track Event and proceed with the Main Quest until you reach a certain point.

Convene Rules

  • [Tideforge Reverbs] is a Reverb Weapon Convene event banner. Use Forging Tide to convene. You are guaranteed at least one 4-Star or higher rarity Resonator or Weapon every 10 attempts.

  • The guarantee count is shared among all Reverb Weapon Convene events and is carried over until a 5-Star Weapon is obtained. Any guarantee count not resulting in a 5-Star Weapon in this Reverb Weapon Convene banner will carry over to the next Reverb Weapon Convene banner.

  • You can select one 5-Star Weapon within a designated range as the Featured Weapon of the event banner (you can re-select at any time). Every time a 5-Star Weapon is obtained, it is guaranteed to be the Featured 5-Star Weapon selected.

  • Selectable 5-Star Weapons: Verdant Summit, Stringmaster, Ages of Harvest, Blazing Brilliance, Rime-Draped Sprouts, and Verity's Handle.

For more details, please refer to the in-game Convene page.

entry.title: [Starpath Reverbs] Reverb Resonator Convene
entry.content:
During the event, selectable 5-Star Resonators: Jiyan, Yinlin, Jinhsi, Changli, Zhezhi, and Xiangli Yao, and 4-Star Resonators: Buling, Sanhua, and Yangyang receive boosted drop rates!

Duration

Version 3.5 update - 2026-08-19 11:59 (server time)

Eligibility

  • Reach Union Level 5.

  • Or complete the combat trial in First Resonance.

  • Or access Main Quest Fast Track Event and proceed with the Main Quest until you reach a certain point.

Convene Rules

  • [Starpath Reverbs] is a Reverb Resonator Convene event banner. Use Radiant Tide to convene. You are guaranteed at least one 4-Star or higher rarity Resonator or Weapon every 10 attempts.

  • The guarantee count is shared among all Reverb Resonator Convene events and is carried over until a 5-Star Resonator is obtained. Any guarantee count not resulting in a 5-Star Resonator in this Reverb Resonator Convene banner will carry over to the next Reverb Resonator Convene banner.

  • You can select one 5-Star Resonator within a designated range as the Featured Resonator of the event banner (you can re-select at any time). Every time a 5-Star Resonator is obtained, there is a 50% chance it will be the Featured 5-Star Resonator of this event banner, and a 50% chance it will be a random non-Featured 5-Star Resonator (not including the selectable Resonators for this event banner). All 5-Star non-Featured Resonators have equal drop rate. If the 5-Star Resonator obtained is not the Featured Resonator selected, the next 5-Star Resonator is guaranteed to be the Featured Resonator.

  • Selectable 5-Star Resonators: Jiyan, Yinlin, Jinhsi, Changli, Zhezhi, and Xiangli Yao.

  • The above selectable 5-Star Resonators' Wavebands will be made available in the Afterglow Coral Store with a limit of 2 purchases, and they will be removed once the Reverb Resonator Convene event ends.

Gifts of Starpath

  • During the event, Convene in the Reverb Resonator Convene to accumulate Convenes and unlock corresponding milestone rewards.

  • After the event ends, any unclaimed event rewards will be reissued via in-game mail if you log in within 30 days.

  • During the ""Blade of Past Resounds, Lingering Dream Hymns"" version period, a special event will be available: Reverb Resonator Convene's first 10x Convene is free. And the 10 free Convenes will also count toward the Gifts of Starpath's milestone count.

For more details, please refer to the in-game Convene page.

entry.title: [Azure Oath] Featured Weapon Convene
entry.content:
During the event, 5-Star Weapon: Azure Oath, 4-Star Weapons: Commando of Conviction, Hollow Mirage, and Discord receive boosted drop rates!

Duration

Version 3.5 update - 2026-07-30 09:59 (server time)

Eligibility

  • Reach Union Level 5.

  • Or complete the combat trial in First Resonance.

  • Or access Main Quest Fast Track Event and proceed with the Main Quest until you reach a certain point.

Convene Rules

  • [Absolute Pulsation] is a Featured Weapon Convene event banner.

  • Use Forging Tide to convene. You are guaranteed at least one 4-Star or higher rarity Resonator or Weapon every 10 attempts.

  • The guarantee count is shared among all Featured Weapon Convene events and is carried over until a 5-Star Weapon is obtained.

  • The 5-Star Weapon you Convene is guaranteed to be Azure Oath.

  • Featured Weapon Azure Oath is exclusive to the Featured Weapon Convene and will not be available by other means once the event ends.

For more details, please refer to the in-game Convene page.

entry.title: [Voices on Azure Feathers] Featured Resonator Convene
entry.content:
During the event, 5-Star Resonator: Yangyang: Xuanling, 4-Star Resonators: Danjin, Chixia, and Aalto receive boosted drop rates!

Duration

Version 3.5 update - 2026-07-30 09:59 (server time)

Eligibility

  • Reach Union Level 5.

  • Or complete the combat trial in First Resonance.

  • Or access Main Quest Fast Track Event and proceed with the Main Quest until you reach a certain point.

Convene Rules

  • [Voices on Azure Feathers] is a Featured Resonator Convene event banner. Use Radiant Tide to convene. You are guaranteed at least one 4-Star or higher rarity Resonator or Weapon every 10 attempts.

  • The guarantee count is shared among all Featured Resonator Convene events and is carried over until a 5-Star Resonator is obtained.

  • Featured Resonator Yangyang: Xuanling is exclusive to the [Voices on Azure Feathers] Featured Resonator Convene and will not be available by other means once the event ends.

  • Featured Resonator Yangyang: Xuanling's Waveband will be simultaneously made available in the Afterglow Coral Store with a limit of 2 purchases, and it will be removed once the Convene event ends.

  • During the event, all the Resonators who receive boosted drop rates will become available in Ascendant Aces as Trial Resonators. Complete their Ascendant Aces challenges to obtain rewards.

For more details, please refer to the in-game Convene page.

entry.title: Resonator Review | Radiant Spectrum — Lynae
entry.content: A Startorch Academy prep student whose head-turning, electric style hides an inner focus as explosive as a coiled spring.

entry.title: Resonator Review | Phase Transition - Luuk Herssen
entry.content:
The attending physician of Startorch Academy's Resonator Nursing Unit, renowned for his keen intellect and unshakable composure. Rumor has it nobody has ever seen him lose control.

He is a keen listener adept at dissecting the shadows in a person's heart. From the unhealing wound on his hand, golden blood seeps, a substance he can summon to become a blade of utmost precision.

entry.title: [Version 3.5 Featured Resonator/Weapon Convene: Phase I]
entry.content:
[When Winter Thaws] Featured Resonator Convene

During the event, 5-Star Resonator: Luuk Herssen, 4-Star Resonators: Danjin, Chixia, and Aalto receive boosted drop rates!

Duration

Version 3.5 update - 2026-07-30 09:59 (server time)

Eligibility

  • Reach Union Level 5.

  • Or complete the combat trial in First Resonance.

  • Or access Main Quest Fast Track Event and proceed with the Main Quest until you reach a certain point.

Convene Rules

  • [When Winter Thaws] is a Featured Resonator Convene event banner. Use Radiant Tide to convene. You are guaranteed at least one 4-Star or higher rarity Resonator or Weapon every 10 attempts.

  • The guarantee count is shared among all Featured Resonator Convene events and is carried over until a 5-Star Resonator is obtained.

  • Featured Resonator Luuk Herssen is exclusive to the [When Winter Thaws] Featured Resonator Convene and will not be available by other means once the event ends.

  • Featured Resonator Luuk Herssen's Waveband will be simultaneously made available in the Afterglow Coral Store with a limit of 2 purchases, and it will be removed once the Convene event ends.

  • During the event, all the Resonators who receive boosted drop rates will become available in Ascendant Aces as Trial Resonators. Complete their Ascendant Aces challenges to obtain rewards.

For more details, please refer to the in-game Convene page.

[Undefined Spectrum] Featured Resonator Convene

During the event, 5-Star Resonator: Lynae, 4-Star Resonators: Danjin, Chixia, and Aalto receive boosted drop rates!

Duration

Version 3.5 update - 2026-07-30 09:59 (server time)

Eligibility

  • Reach Union Level 5.

  • Or complete the combat trial in First Resonance.

  • Or access Main Quest Fast Track Event and proceed with the Main Quest until you reach a certain point.

Convene Rules

  • [Undefined Spectrum] is a Featured Resonator Convene event banner. Use Radiant Tide to convene. You are guaranteed at least one 4-Star or higher rarity Resonator or Weapon every 10 attempts.

  • The guarantee count is shared among all Featured Resonator Convene events and is carried over until a 5-Star Resonator is obtained.

  • Featured Resonator Lynae is exclusive to the [Undefined Spectrum] Featured Resonator Convene and will not be available by other means once the event ends.

  • Featured Resonator Lynae's Waveband will be simultaneously made available in the Afterglow Coral Store with a limit of 2 purchases, and it will be removed once the Convene event ends.

  • During the event, all the Resonators who receive boosted drop rates will become available in Ascendant Aces as Trial Resonators. Complete their Ascendant Aces challenges to obtain rewards.

For more details, please refer to the in-game Convene page.

[Daybreaker's Spine] Featured Weapon Convene

During the event, 5-Star Weapon: Daybreaker's Spine, 4-Star Weapons: Commando of Conviction, Hollow Mirage, and Discord receive boosted drop rates!

Duration

Version 3.5 update - 2026-07-30 09:59 (server time)

Eligibility

  • Reach Union Level 5.

  • Or complete the combat trial in First Resonance.

  • Or access Main Quest Fast Track Event and proceed with the Main Quest until you reach a certain point.

Convene Rules

  • [Absolute Pulsation] is a Featured Weapon Convene event banner.

  • Use Forging Tide to convene. You are guaranteed at least one 4-Star or higher rarity Resonator or Weapon every 10 attempts.

  • The guarantee count is shared among all Featured Weapon Convene events and is carried over until a 5-Star Weapon is obtained.

  • The 5-Star Weapon you Convene is guaranteed to be Daybreaker's Spine.

  • Featured Weapon Daybreaker's Spine is exclusive to the Featured Weapon Convene and will not be available by other means once the event ends.

For more details, please refer to the in-game Convene page.

[Spectrum Blaster] Featured Weapon Convene

During the event, 5-Star Weapon: Spectrum Blaster, 4-Star Weapons: Commando of Conviction, Hollow Mirage, and Discord receive boosted drop rates!

Duration

Version 3.5 update - 2026-07-30 09:59 (server time)

Eligibility

  • Reach Union Level 5.

  • Or complete the combat trial in First Resonance.

  • Or access Main Quest Fast Track Event and proceed with the Main Quest until you reach a certain point.

Convene Rules

  • [Absolute Pulsation] is a Featured Weapon Convene event banner.

  • Use Forging Tide to convene. You are guaranteed at least one 4-Star or higher rarity Resonator or Weapon every 10 attempts.

  • The guarantee count is shared among all Featured Weapon Convene events and is carried over until a 5-Star Weapon is obtained.

  • The 5-Star Weapon you Convene is guaranteed to be Spectrum Blaster.

  • Featured Weapon Spectrum Blaster is exclusive to the Featured Weapon Convene and will not be available by other means once the event ends.

For more details, please refer to the in-game Convene page.

entry.title: Wuthering Waves Update Content | Version 3.5 "Blade of Past Resounds, Lingering Dream Hymns" Planned for Release on July 10 (UTC+8)
entry.content: Here's the event calendar for Version 3.5. Check it out for a quick overview of the event schedule! Full details about the update content can be viewed on our official website—be sure to take a look:

entry.title: Profile Reveal | Vessel of Sounds — Rover: Electro
entry.content:
Loading Data>>>

Rover: Electro

Rover has awakened a new Resonance Ability, wielding all-new Electro skills. The workings of the world in all its forms, all gathered in the palm of one hand. You made a promise to seek the faint reflection in the prism. The riddle that was never yours to solve now awaits an answer none could have foretold.

entry.title: Wuthering Waves Fan Creation Event Winners Reveal
entry.content:
Wuthering Waves Fan Creation Event "The Dream Not Dreamed" has concluded, and we want to express our heartfelt appreciation to all participants for their dedication and creativity in our fan art event.

Let's view the winning entries and their contributors!

entry.title: Profile Reveal | Voices of Azure Plume - Yangyang: Xuanling
entry.content:
Loading Data>>>

Yangyang: Xuanling

Born the second daughter of a renowned musical family in Mingting, she is gentle yet strong, pure of heart and romantic, a lady who draws her sword in the name of justice. As a "Votary of the Voice," she can commune with the Streams. Once an Outrider of the Midnight Rangers in Jinzhou, she now serves as an acting Xuan Watcher of Xuanfang Hold. Free as a breeze, bold in her chivalry, her life and her blade exist only to protect.

entry.title: New Region Preview II | Mengzhou: Land of Xuanfang is coming soon! Get a first look at its quests and monsters!
entry.content: New Region Preview II | Mengzhou: Land of Xuanfang is coming soon! Get a first look at its quests and monsters!

entry.title: Wuthering Waves Version 3.5 Update Maintenance Notice
entry.content:
Dear Rovers,

To bring you exciting new content and a better gaming experience, we will soon perform update maintenance for Version 3.5 "Blade of Past Resounds, Lingering Dream Hymns".

You will be temporarily unable to log into the game during the maintenance. Please plan your gaming time accordingly. As this update requires a large download, we recommend updating the game while connected to a Wi-Fi network. We apologize for any inconvenience this may cause and thank you for your understanding.

[Maintenance Time & Compensation]

✦Maintenance Duration: 2026-07-10 04:00 - 2026-07-10 11:00 (UTC+8)

✦Maintenance Compensation: Astrite ×300, Crystal Solvent ×2

✦Compensation Eligibility: Create a character and unlock the Mail function before 2026-07-10 04:00 (UTC+8). The compensation mail is valid until the update maintenance for the next version begins.

Maintenance duration may be extended depending on the actual progress. The development team will provide follow-up announcements and adjust compensation accordingly.

[How to Update]

Once the update maintenance begins, you can update your client using the following methods:

✦PC: Close the game, restart the launcher, and click Update.

✦Android: Launch the game and follow the in-game pop-up instructions to update.

✦iOS: Go to the App Store to download/update.

✦Mac: Go to the App Store to download/update.

✦PS5™: Go to the PS5 home screen, select Wuthering Waves, press the OPTIONS button, and select Check for Update.

[Pre-download Details]

✦Pre-download Start Time: 2026-07-08 10:00 (UTC+8)

[Pre-download Space Requirements]

✦PC: 76GB

✦Android: 29GB

✦iOS: 29GB

※Special Notice: Version 3.5 uses resource compression technology to update existing files in the client, so this pre-download is noticeably larger and requires more free storage than recent updates. This is a one-time adjustment; pre-download sizes are expected to return to normal starting with the next update. We apologize for the inconvenience this may cause Rovers in the meantime, and thank you for your continued support and understanding of Wuthering Waves.

※Please note that you will not be able to pre-download if you do not have enough reserved storage space.

※To ensure there is sufficient storage space for resource integration during the update maintenance, a certain amount of space must be reserved (PC: 76GB | Android/iOS: 13GB). Therefore, the actual download size for this pre-download is (PC: 52GB | Android/iOS: 16GB). After the update maintenance is complete, the extra space used for the resources merging process will be automatically freed up.

[How to Pre-download]

✦PC: When pre-download for the latest version becomes available, "New Version Pre-download" appears below the "Start" button on the launcher interface. Select this option to pre-download the resources.

✦Android/iOS: When pre-download for the latest version becomes available, press the "Pre-download" button, either on the title screen after a successful login or on the in-game Terminal page, and confirm to pre-download the resources.

You can continue playing the game while the pre-downloading process is ongoing. The process can be paused at any time. Whether it is complete or not, the update maintenance will speed up to a certain degree when initiated.

Please ensure that a stable network connection during the pre-downloading process.

[Version 3.5 Content Preview]

[New Resonators]

5-Star Resonator: Yangyang: Xuanling (Havoc/Sword)

※Available from the [Voices on Azure Feathers] Featured Resonator Convene.

5-Star Resonator: Suisui (Glacio/Rectifier)

※Available from the [Blessings From Dewy Winds] Featured Resonator Convene.

New Rover Attribute: Rover (Electro)

※Complete Main Quest Chapter IV Act II "Xuanling Sings, Storm Quelled" to unlock.

[New Weapons]

5-Star Weapon: Azure Oath (Sword)

※Available from the [Azure Oath] Featured Weapon Convene.

5-Star Weapon: Firstlight's Herald (Rectifier)

※Available from the [Firstlight's Herald] Featured Weapon Convene.

[New Region]

Mengzhou: Land of Xuanfang

This region includes the following areas: Xuanfang Hold, Eastern Xuan Peaks, Western Fang Peaks, and Southern Yuan Hills.

※Follow the guidance of Main Quest Chapter IV Act I "The Wind Before the Storm" to access this region.

[New Echoes]

Myriad Snare: Rustfire Chassis, Thousand-Puppet Pavilion, Fog Lionarch, Forbidden Bastion, Kernel Puppet: Joy, Kernel Puppet: Anger, Kernel Puppet: Worry, Kernel Puppet: Reflection, Kernel Puppet: Grief, Kernel Puppet: Fright, Fog Lionarch: Body, Fog Lionarch: Head, Smiter, Smolder, Porcelain Picket, Stone Picket, and Aureate Picket

Added Sonata Effects: Lamp of Nether Road (5pcs Set), Heart of Evil's Purge (5pcs Set), and Song of Feathered Trace (5pcs Set)

Added Tacet Fields: Western Fang Peaks Tacet Field and Eastern Xuan Peaks Tacet Field

Added Tacet Discord Nest: Southern Yuan Hills Tacet Discord Nest

[New Story]

Main Quest Chapter IV: Act I "The Wind Before the Storm"

Main Quest Chapter IV: Act II "Xuanling Sings, Storm Quelled"

Main Quest Chapter IV: Segue "The Chant of Unseen Ties"

Exploration Quest: "Code Red: Corehazard"

Exploration Quest: "Faithful Heart Tested at Skyfall"

Exploration Quest: "Autopuppets in Fog Veiled Chambers"

[Feature Optimizations]

Added the Pioneer Experience feature, which integrates previous story fast track features and adds "Next Stop: Mengzhou"

Added the Resonator Voice Pack Customization feature

Added the Bioprint feature

Optimized the display effects of the Echo Gallery and Enemies, adding dynamic breathing animations

Optimized the Story Auto-Play feature

Optimized the Guidebook feature

[Other Optimizations]

Optimized the model appearance of Rover

Added resource compression technology on PC to reduce storage space usage

Added [XeSS 3] frame generation support on PC

Optimized the Resource Cleanup feature on mobile devices

[New Challenges]

Tactical Hologram: Sparring Challenge: Denia

The second cycle of Endstate Matrix is open: Version 3.5 - Version 3.8

[Other New Content]

[Expedition Motorbike Chassis] Cloud Ride

[Weapon Projection] Projection: Blade of a Thousand Arts

[Titles] "Virtual Beacon" and "Until We Meet Again"

[Sigils] "Space and Blake Bloom Medal," "Past the Endstate: Adversity Vanguard," and "Xuanfang Wonder"

[Avatars] Space and Blake Bloom

[New Store Arrivals]

[Outfits] Deluxe Outfit: Lynae - Peppermint and Deluxe Outfit: Chisa - Peach Parfait

[Accessories] Yangyang: Xuanling - Cloud Lark and Suisui - Upon Rosy Clouds

[Expedition Motorbike Model] Nightveil Piercer Premium Model

[Special Events]

[A Glimpse of Xuanfang] Area Exploration Event

[Shape of Yesterday] Photo Collection Event

[Lament Recon: Tacet Crisis] Combat Event

[Recaptured: Action Highlights] Combat Photography Event

[Lollo Campaign: New Journey] Featured Commission Event

[Virtual Crisis: Quadrant Trials] Crisis Trial Challenge Event

[Gifts of Aftertune] 7-Day Login Event

[H5 Web Events]

In Search of Lost Jade Web Event

※For more details regarding the new version update, system optimizations, and bug fixes, please stay tuned for the upcoming Version 3.5 Content Details.

[Device Requirements]

To ensure a smooth installation and gaming experience, we recommend that Rovers refer to the following system requirements:

  1. Minimum Requirements

Android: OS version 7.0 or above, Snapdragon 835, MediaTek G71/72 or equivalent processor, 4 GB RAM or more

iOS: OS version 14 or above; iPhone 11 or later, iPad with A13 or equivalent processor, 4 GB RAM or more

Mac: macOS version 12.0 or above, M1 or later model, 16 GB RAM or more

PC: [OS] Windows 10 64-bit, [CPU] Intel i5 (9th Gen)/Ryzen 2700, [Graphics] GTX 1060/RX 570/Intel Arc A380, [RAM] 16 GB or more

  1. Recommended Requirements

Android: OS version 7.0 or above, Snapdragon 8 Gen 1+/Gen 2/Gen 3 or equivalent MediaTek processor, 6 GB RAM or more

iOS: OS version 15 or above; iPhone 13 or later, iPad with A15 or equivalent processor, 6 GB RAM or more

Mac: macOS version 15.0 or above, M3 or later model, 16 GB RAM or more

PC: [OS] Windows 10 64-bit, [CPU] Intel i7 (9th Gen)/Ryzen 3700, [Graphics] RTX 2060/RX 5700XT/Intel Arc A750, [RAM] 16 GB or more

  1. Storage Requirements

Android/iOS: 60 GB

Mac: 155 GB

PC: 115 GB (SSD recommended for installation)

PS5™: Please ensure you have sufficient storage space to complete the update.

  1. Controller Support

Mobile devices support the following controllers:

Wireless connection: Xbox series, Xbox Elite series, DualShock®4, DualSense®, DualSense Edge™

Mac devices support the following controllers:

Wired/Wireless connection: Xbox series, Xbox Elite series, DualShock®4, DualSense®, DualSense Edge™

PC devices support the following controllers:

Wired/Wireless connection: Xbox series, Xbox Elite series, DualSense®, DualSense Edge™

Wired connection: DualShock®4

When connecting other controllers that support multiple input modes to a PC, we recommend adjusting their settings to Xinput mode for the best experience.

entry.title: Post-Lament Anthropocene: Enemies — Collection of Small & Medium Size Echoes in Mengzhou: Land of Xuanfang
entry.content:
Post-Lament Anthropocene: Enemies — Collection of Small & Medium Size Echoes in Mengzhou: Land of Xuanfang

The Autopuppet spends year after year patrolling these halls, purging the Tacet Discords and any lingering threats left within, maintaining peace in Xuanfang.

entry.title: Post-Lament Anthropocene: Stars Intertwined | Yangyang: Xuanling
entry.content: "Come on! Let's go where the wind takes us."—Yangyang: Xuanling

entry.title: New Region Preview I | Mengzhou: Land of Xuanfang is coming soon!
entry.content: New Region Preview I | Mengzhou: Land of Xuanfang is coming soon! Get a first look at its landscapes and gameplay!

entry.title: Chisa's Deluxe Outfit "Peach Parfait" will be permanently available
entry.content:
"The sky's colors melt into the sea. Splashing waves sparkle in the brilliant summer sun. A bird glides across the boundless blue overhead. A slice of watermelon and a perfectly chilled peach parfait. Just another slow summer day for her."

Chisa's Deluxe Outfit "Peach Parfait" will become available once Version 3.5 goes live. Get a sneak peek now!

How to Obtain

Chisa's Deluxe Outfit "Peach Parfait" will be permanently available in the Store once Version 3.5 goes live.

Purchase the Outfit during Version 3.5 at a discount price of 1,980 Lunites. After Version 3.5 ends, the price will return to 2,480 Lunites.

entry.title: Lynae's Deluxe Outfit "Peppermint" will be permanently available
entry.content:
"Endless sunshine, golden sand beaches, and vibrant hues bursting everywhere—summer's here! Lynae's favorite season, hands down! Hm? The heatwave sapped your energy? Why not pop open another ice-cold soda? (∩^o^)⊃━☆ﾟ.* ･"

Lynae's Deluxe Outfit "Peppermint" will become available once Version 3.5 goes live. Get a sneak peek now!

How to Obtain

Lynae's Deluxe Outfit "Peppermint" will be permanently available in the Store once Version 3.5 goes live.

Purchase the Outfit during Version 3.5 at a discount price of 1,980 Lunites. After Version 3.5 ends, the price will return to 2,480 Lunites.

entry.title: "Nightveil Piercer" Premium Model Set Bundle
entry.content:
"A spirit bird whose cry heralds the dawn; a morning star that lights the dark night."

The "Nightveil Piercer" Motorbike Premium Model will go live after the Version 3.5 update. Take a look at its details.

How to Obtain

After the Version 3.5 update, the "Nightveil Piercer" Premium Model Set Bundle will be permanently available in the Vehicle Looks Store. The Bundle includes "Nightveil Piercer" Premium Model x1 and Astrite x600, priced at 29.99 USD.

entry.title: Wuthering Waves - XBOX Game Pass Gift Pack & XBOX Exclusive Sigil
entry.content:
Dear Rovers,

Starting with Wuthering Waves Version 3.5, XBOX Game Pass members can claim exclusive in-game rewards!

  • Version 3.5 will be released on July 10th, 2026 (UTC+8).

Rewards

XBOX Game Pass Gift Pack (Once per Version):

Morphable Echo x2, Premium Tuner x10, Shell Credit x30,000

XBOX Exclusive Sigil: "Paths and Possibilities" (One-Time Reward):

An exclusive Sigil available only to XBOX Game Pass members. Once claimed, it will be permanently added to your account.

How to Claim

XBOX Game Pass Gift Pack:

After each version update, XBOX Game Pass members can log in to the XBOX Series X|S or XBOX PC version of Wuthering Waves and claim the Gift Pack via in-game mail.

XBOX Exclusive Sigil:

After updating to Version 3.5, XBOX Game Pass members can log in to the XBOX Series X|S or XBOX PC version of Wuthering Waves and claim the exclusive Sigil via in-game mail. This is a one-time reward.

Notes

You must reach Union Level 2 and unlock the Mail feature to claim these rewards.

Each UID can claim one XBOX Game Pass Gift Pack per version.

Each UID can obtain the XBOX Exclusive Sigil only once. It cannot be claimed again.

Reward delivery may be delayed in some cases. If you do not receive the rewards, please try logging in again later.

If you have any questions, please contact our official customer support.
